title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
